title: Add OnBuild test to baseline test
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds a test to the baseline tests to make sure OnBuild works in Dockerfiles.  As a side benefit this also validates the format=docker parameter.

This test is not run by the CI tests, it is only run 'by hand' as part of the kit verification process.
